positive: A majestic, stylized nocturnal scene depicting a group of silhouetted celestial fauna, such as crescent moons, stylized owls, and soaring constellations, gathered around a central, glowing, bioluminescent forest canopy. The composition is symmetrical and vertically oriented, featuring deep indigo and violet gradients contrasted by brilliant, neon teal and gold accents emanating from the magical foliage. Use negative space effectively to emphasize the silhouettes. Minimalist yet detailed. Art style should be modern, graphic vector illustration meets ethereal cosmic fantasy. Focus on strong outlines and clean color blocking, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noisy, overexposed, solid color background, photographic, photorealism
